version_selection.reason: v1.0.0 is an existing immutable tag; PyPI, GitHub tag, and GitHub Release did not contain 1.0.1 during preflight

order: freeze main candidate and successful CI
build and verify sdist and wheel
create annotated tag and GitHub Release
human uploads the same artifacts to PyPI with hidden token input
install from public PyPI and rerun check plus live status
record final public Evidence in a separate Issue and PR

secret_boundary.manual_upload: The human enters the token in a hidden prompt from their own terminal.

post_publish_verification: PyPI JSON API returns version 1.0.1 and artifact hashes
clean environment installs github-task-protocol==1.0.1 from PyPI
gtp check accepts the valid Contract fixture
gtp status reconstructs a live done Issue
gtp status reconstructs a live stopped Issue
annotated tag, GitHub Release, PyPI metadata, and runtime version agree
evidence_limits: A successful upload does not prove code quality or credential safety.
GTP and CI do not grant publication, completion, or merge authority.
